name: ordered-dither-pass
title: Ordered Dither Pass
description: Bayer-matrix ordered dithering quantizes a slotted scene (rasterized once at mount): the image emerges from pure 2-tone noise to clean, or dissolves the reverse. Stateless per frame, never error diffusion.
evidence: Wave M M2: Codrops 'Building a Real-Time Dithering Shader' (Niccolo Fanton, 2025-06-04), the ordered-not-error-diffusion pass from the wild scout

variables.label: Matrix
variables.description: Bayer matrix size: 2 is the coarsest crosshatch, 8 the smoothest ordered grain.

variables.label: Direction
variables.description: in resolves noise to clean; out dissolves clean to noise and holds it.

variables.label: Levels
variables.description: Quantization levels per color channel during the dithered phase.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Light tone of the 2-tone noise phase: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the frame leaves. None holds the final state.
